name: @mindx/faicey
description: Definitive agent persona and model persona face creator and face cloning software with scientific hyper-realistic expressions for machine learning models

scripts.personas:list: node -e "import { createPersonaManager } from './core/index.js'; const pm = createPersonaManager(); await pm.initialize(); console.log('Available templates:', pm.getAllTemplates().map(t => t.name));"
scripts.personas:create: node -e "import { createFaicey } from './core/index.js'; const faicey = createFaicey(); await faicey.initialize(); const persona = await faicey.createPersona('professor-codephreak', 'test-persona'); console.log('Created persona:', persona.name);"

author: mindX
